name: standards-refresh.sh entries without a scope block keep the single-page path and produce no crawl summary or manifest artifacts
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r41-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

other HTML printf '

Other

Linked page rule

A linked page that a single-page entry must never fetch.

' > $OUT/other.html cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/european-union/r41-src.yaml; [ -f $T ] && ! grep -q 'crawl sid=' e.err && ! ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/crawls/"r41-src-*.jsonl 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q 'linked-page-rule' $T && grep -q 'WROTE sid=r41-src' e.err && echo no-scope-stays-single-page 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
